theme.rationale: Provides authority, clarity, and truth while remaining approachable for first-time youth voters. Evokes a sense of modern, transparent government.

sizes.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-black text-slate-900
sizes.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold text-slate-900

layout_spacing.timeline_grid: flex flex-col relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:ml-5 before:-translate-x-px md:before:mx-auto md:before:translate-x-0 before:h-full before:w-0.5 before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-transparent before:via-slate-300 before:to-transparent

cards.style: Neumorphic/Clay & Crisp: bg-white shadow-sm border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.rules: Internal padding must be p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision. Never use grey-on-grey.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-900 text-white hover:bg-blue-800 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-blue-900
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-orange-600

chat_assistant.container: fixed bottom-4 right-4 w-[350px] md:w-[400px] max-h-[600px] bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] border border-slate-200 flex flex-col overflow-hidden z-50
chat_assistant.header: bg-blue-900 text-white p-4 flex justify-between items-center font-semibold

navigation.style: Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50

images.description: 3D illustration of an interactive ballot box with floating digital UI elements representing civic duty, voting, and democracy.
images.usage: Use in the hero section to set a modern, tech-forward, civic tone.

images.description: Abstract geometric background with soft gradients.
images.usage: Use as a full-screen background for landing pages or specific sections requiring depth.

images.description: Minimalist modern 3D illustration of an Indian electronic voting machine (EVM).
images.usage: Use in the 'How to Vote' step-by-step section.

images.description: Abstract seamless texture with subtle noise grain and delicate topographical contour lines.
images.usage: Use as a textured background for the quiz or timeline section.

interactions.hover: All interactive elements must explicitly define hover text and background. Scale transform: hover:-translate-y-1 for cards.
interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings required: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-900 focus:ring-offset-2
interactions.timeline: Timeline nodes should pulse or grow on hover. Details panel should slide in or fade in gracefully (Framer Motion).
interactions.chat: Chat bubbles should appear with a slight slide-up and fade-in animation.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. Avoid transparent backgrounds behind text.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Interactive Election Timeline' using a vertical scroll layout (or proportional horizontal on desktop) with pop-ups/hovers for hidden details.
Implement 'Step-by-Step Voting Guide' using a Bento Grid approach to present modular content.
For the 'AI Chat Assistant', use a sticky glassmorphic floating button or a sidebar that expands. Tone should be non-political, educational.
Use Google Fonts for importing Cabinet Grotesk or use Outfit. Use IBM Plex Sans for body.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, dropdowns, and cards, but customize them by softening borders and using generous padding (p-6 or p-8).
